allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); tok=d.get\('access_token'\); print\(tok[:20]+'...' if tok else str\(d\)\)")
PowerShell($s = Get-WmiObject win32_service -Filter "name='MongoDB'"; Write-Output "PathName: $\($s.PathName\)"; Write-Output "StartName: $\($s.StartName\)"; Write-Output "State: $\($s.State\)")
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -u root -- service docker start)

Bash(powershell -Command "wsl -d Ubuntu -- docker run -d --rm --name zap-test -p 8090:8090 --add-host host.docker.internal:host-gateway ghcr.io/zaproxy/zaproxy:stable zap.sh -daemon -host 0.0.0.0 -port 8090 -config api.disablekey=true")

Bash(powershell -Command "wsl -d Ubuntu -u root -- bash -c 'service docker start && sleep 2 && docker run -d --rm --name zap-test -p 8090:8090 --add-host host.docker.internal:host-gateway ghcr.io/zaproxy/zaproxy:stable zap.sh -daemon -host 0.0.0.0 -port 8090 -config api.disablekey=true'")

Bash(powershell -Command "wsl -d Ubuntu -u root -- service docker start; Start-Sleep 3; wsl -d Ubuntu -- docker run -d --rm --name zap-test -p 8090:8090 '--add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway' ghcr.io/zaproxy/zaproxy:stable zap.sh -daemon -host 0.0.0.0 -port 8090 -config api.disablekey=true")
Bash(powershell -Command "wsl -d Ubuntu -- docker ps; wsl -d Ubuntu -- docker logs zap-test --tail 20")
Bash(powershell -Command "wsl -d Ubuntu -u root -- service docker start; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; wsl -d Ubuntu -- hostname -I")

Bash(powershell -Command "wsl -d Ubuntu -- docker run -d --rm --name porttest -p 8090:80 nginx:alpine; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; python -c \\"import urllib.request; print\(urllib.request.urlopen\('http://172.28.76.59:8090/', timeout=5\).status\)\\" 2>&1; wsl -d Ubuntu -- docker stop porttest")

Bash(powershell -Command "wsl -d Ubuntu -- docker run -d --rm --name zap-realtest -p 8090:8090 '--add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway' ghcr.io/zaproxy/zaproxy:stable zap.sh -daemon -host 0.0.0.0 -port 8090 -config api.disablekey=true; wsl -d Ubuntu -- sleep 600")
Bash(powershell -Command "wsl -d Ubuntu -u root -- service docker start; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; wsl -d Ubuntu -- docker ps; wsl -d Ubuntu -- docker stop zap-realtest 2>&1")

Bash(powershell -Command "wsl -d Ubuntu -u root -- service docker start; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; wsl -d Ubuntu -- docker run -d --name zap-logtest '--add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway' -p 8090:8090 ghcr.io/zaproxy/zaproxy:stable zap.sh -daemon -host 0.0.0.0 -port 8090 -config api.disablekey=true; Write-Host 'Container started, waiting 60s...'; Start-Sleep -Seconds 60; wsl -d Ubuntu -- docker logs zap-logtest --tail 30; wsl -d Ubuntu -- docker inspect zap-logtest --format '{{.State.Status}} {{.State.Health.Status}}'")
Bash(python -c "import urllib.request; r = urllib.request.urlopen\('http://localhost:8090/JSON/core/view/version/', timeout=5\); print\('ZAP API OK:', r.read\(\).decode\(\)\)")
Bash(powershell -Command "wsl -d Ubuntu -- docker inspect zap-logtest --format '{{.State.Status}} health={{.State.Health.Status}}'; wsl -d Ubuntu -- docker logs zap-logtest --tail 40")

Bash(powershell -Command "wsl -d Ubuntu -- docker run -d --name zap-apitest '--add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway' -p 8090:8090 ghcr.io/zaproxy/zaproxy:stable zap.sh -daemon -host 0.0.0.0 -port 8090 -config api.disablekey=true -config api.addrs.addr.name=.* -config api.addrs.addr.regex=true")

Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('tailwindcss:', p.dependencies?.tailwindcss||p.devDependencies?.tailwindcss\); console.log\('next:', p.dependencies?.next\); console.log\('new deps:', Object.keys\({...p.dependencies,...p.devDependencies}\).filter\(k=>['framer-motion','recharts','lucide-react','@radix-ui/react-slot'].includes\(k\)\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**p.get\('dependencies',{}\), **p.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; [print\(k,v\) for k,v in deps.items\(\) if 'motion' in k.lower\(\) or 'anime' in k.lower\(\) or 'gsap' in k.lower\(\)]")
